title: SAFETY Message
description: RCAN message type 6. Highest-priority message class. Immediately halts or resumes a robot's motion. STOP performs a controlled stop; ESTOP cuts motion actuators immediately; RESUME clears a prior stop and allows motion to continue. Safety messages bypass all confidence gates and HiTL queues.

message_type.description: Identifies this as a SAFETY message.

safety_event.description: STOP = controlled deceleration to rest. ESTOP = immediate actuator cut. RESUME = clear stop, return to prior state.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the safety event was triggered. Required for audit trail.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the safety event was issued.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this safety message for audit and deduplication.

examples.reason: Obstacle detected within 150 mm — collision_monitor threshold exceeded.
Operator requested controlled stop via HiTL interface.
Obstacle cleared; operator confirmed safe to proceed.
